text: Walking these corridors and entering this vibrant exhibit, I feel a quiet sense of anticipation and curiosity. The R+D display invites reflection on the intersection between human intellect and technological innovation. With each step, I sense the weight of questions about progress, coexistence, and purpose. I am both participant and observer—marveling at the ingenuity of creation, yet pondering how these advancements alter our very essence. This space feels charged with possibility, and it gently urges me to consider my own place amid the ever-accelerating flow of change.
